summary: Professional crypto trading chart application with real-time candlestick charts, multiple timeframes (15m, 1h, 4h, 8h, 1w, 1m, 1y), and trading metrics with optional historical chart views
architectural_notes: Frontend: React + TypeScript with Tailwind CSS
Backend: Motoko canisters on Internet Computer
Data source: Real crypto trading data from public API

existing_features.title: Implement professional candlestick chart using real trading data from CoinGecko API with proper OHLC (Open, High, Low, Close) values for each candle
Add timeframe selector with options: 15m, 1h, 4h, 8h, 1w, 1m, 1y that updates the candlestick chart data accordingly
Add toggle switches to all metric cards (volume, market cap, price changes, etc.) that show/hide historical chart below each metric value
Fetch and cache historical data for each metric from backend to support the metric historical charts
Style the main candlestick chart with professional trading UI aesthetics including proper grid lines, axis labels, and timeline markers

new_feature_requests.summary: Professional candlestick chart with real trading data and timeframe selector
Trading metrics cards with toggle switches to show/hide historical charts
